languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

languages.text: "А я — свое. Вопросы, которые задает человек могут сказать о нем больше, чем то, что он говорит про себя сам".
"As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."
languages.original_text: "А я — свое. Вопросы, которые задает человек могут сказать о нем больше, чем то, что он говорит про себя сам".

traits.locale_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."
"As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."
"As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

languages.text: «Al igual que la mía. Las preguntas pueden revelar más sobre quien las hace que cualquier cosa que diga».
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

traits.locale_text: «Al igual que la mía. Las preguntas pueden revelar más sobre quien las hace que cualquier cosa que diga».

languages.text: “我也一样。一个人问出的问题，往往比他对自己的描述更能暴露他的本质。”
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

traits.locale_text: “我也一样。一个人问出的问题，往往比他对自己的描述更能暴露他的本质。”

languages.text: « Et la mienne également. Une simple question peut parfois en révéler bien plus sur la personne qui la pose qu'une longue conversation. »
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

traits.locale_text: « Et la mienne également. Une simple question peut parfois en révéler bien plus sur la personne qui la pose qu'une longue conversation. »

languages.text: "Meine ebenfalls. Fragen können mehr über den Fragenden verraten, als alles, was er über sich sagt."
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Meine ebenfalls. Fragen können mehr über den Fragenden verraten, als alles, was er über sich sagt."

languages.text: "私と同じように。質問は、質問者が自分自身について語るどんなことよりも、質問者についてより多くを明らかにすることができる"
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

languages.text: "Ben de. Sorular, soran kişi hakkında kendi söylediklerinden daha fazlasını ortaya çıkarabilir."
languages.original_text: "As has mine. Questions can reveal more about the asker than anything they may say about themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de. Sorular, soran kişi hakkında kendi söylediklerinden daha fazlasını ortaya çıkarabilir."
